description: AIMO 3 math solver. Deadline April 8 2026. 159/159 tests must stay green. Use Codex for implementation tasks, Claude for complex reasoning.

tasks.title: Swap majority vote for AnswerSelector in kaggle_notebook.py
tasks.description: Replace the Counter/majority_vote logic in notebook/kaggle_notebook.py with src/solver/answer_selector.AnswerSelector.select(). Build minimal VerificationReport objects (ConfidenceLevel.NL_JUDGMENT) for each attempt where real reports are unavailable. Must not break any existing tests.

tasks.title: Add prompt reinforcement for CONTEXT_CONFABULATION + MISSING_FINAL_COMMIT
tasks.description: Add 3 phrases to agent/prompts.py system/user prompt to address top flaw codes. Phrases from PHASE4_HANDOFF.md Track A. Must not break existing tests. Re-run ablation after: python scripts/ablation_extraction.py
acceptanceCriteria: agent/prompts.py includes mandatory **ANSWER: N** format instruction

tasks.title: Verify ablation: extract_rate improves from 21% to ≥40%
tasks.description: Run python scripts/ablation_extraction.py and compare extract_rate on research_data2.jsonl before vs after P4-A2. Write result summary to docs/ABLATION_RESULTS_P4A.md. If rate < 40%, diagnose why and open a new task.
acceptanceCriteria: extract_rate ≥ 40% on research_data2.jsonl OR new diagnostic task created

tasks.title: Implement select_two() two-attempt policy in AnswerSelector
tasks.description: Add select_two() to src/solver/answer_selector.py per the spec in PHASE4_HANDOFF.md Track C. Returns (best, second_best_disagreeing). Add tests: test_select_two_returns_different_answers, test_select_two_when_unanimous.

tasks.title: Integrate select_two into notebook for 2-attempt submission policy
tasks.description: Update notebook/kaggle_notebook.py to use AnswerSelector.select_two(). Attempt 1 = highest-confidence answer, Attempt 2 = highest-confidence disagreeing answer. Must be safe — if select_two returns None for second, fall back to same as first.
acceptanceCriteria: Graceful fallback when second is None

tasks.title: [CLAUDE] Formalize verification budget allocation as optimization problem
tasks.description: The evolution.md identifies the core open problem: how to optimally allocate a finite verification compute budget across N solution traces and M verifiable claims. Formalize this as a stochastic scheduling problem. Produce a concrete algorithm (pseudocode) for src/solver/answer_selector.py that implements budget-aware verification allocation. The warm-up is the multi-armed bandit case (uniform costs). The full problem requires Lagrangian relaxation or Whittle index. Think step-by-step with extended thinking enabled.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/VERIFICATION_BUDGET_ALGORITHM.md produced with formal problem statement + pseudocode
Algorithm is implementable in Python within answer_selector.py

tasks.title: [CLAUDE] Review BASELINE_METRICS and diagnose why aime_2024_3 / aime_2024_5 have 0 extractions
tasks.description: From BASELINE_METRICS.md: aime_2024_3 (GT=809) and aime_2024_5 (GT=104) have no_answer_extracted with PSEUDO_VERIFICATION flaws. These are solver quality failures. Read the raw traces in data/verification/audit_research_data.jsonl for these problems. Use gitnexus to trace the full extraction pipeline. Produce a diagnostic in docs/EXTRACTION_FAILURE_ANALYSIS.md with root cause and a concrete fix proposal.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause identified (solver never reaches correct answer vs. extraction strips it)
Concrete fix proposed (prompt change, sampler config, or extraction rule)

tasks.title: Run run_baseline.py after all Track A changes and update BASELINE_METRICS.md
tasks.description: Run python scripts/run_baseline.py and overwrite docs/BASELINE_METRICS.md with new results. Target: correct count on research_data.jsonl improves from 3/8 to ≥5/8.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/BASELINE_METRICS.md regenerated with 2026-03-21 or later date
Correct count ≥ 5/8 on research_data.jsonl OR diagnostic task created

tasks.title: [CLAUDE] Implement inference_engine.py stub — multi-temperature diverse sampling
tasks.description: src/solver/inference_engine.py and src/solver/sampling_strategy.py are stubs. Implement the core of inference_engine to support multi-temperature sampling (SamplingConfig). This is Track D from PHASE4_HANDOFF. Only start after P4-A1 through P4-C2 are complete. Read the existing stubs first. Use gitnexus_impact before editing.
acceptanceCriteria: inference_engine.py no longer raises NotImplementedError for core methods
≥3 new tests added to tests/ for the new functionality

tasks.title: Clean up root-level clutter per MOVE_CANDIDATES.md Safe tier
tasks.description: Execute only the Safe tier moves from docs/MOVE_CANDIDATES.md — chat logs, .bak files, noise — to _attic/noise/. Do NOT touch Risky tier. Do NOT remove any Python files or docs. Run tests after.
acceptanceCriteria: No Python source files moved or deleted
